query:
INSERT INTO ai_free_token_daily_usage (day, cost_nanos, updated_at)
         VALUES ((now() at time zone 'utc')::date, $1::bigint, now())
         ON CONFLICT (day) DO UPDATE
         SET cost_nanos = ai_free_token_daily_usage.cost_nanos + $1::bigint,
             updated_at = now()
         WHERE ai_free_token_daily_usage.cost_nanos < $2::bigint
         RETURNING cost_nanos
